column1: 15k COMPOUNDING MODEL  ▸  Sequential 6.28% Profit Chain  ▸  Tax: 20% STCG (Post Budget Jul 2024)  ▸  Reinvestment: 50% of after-tax profit

KEY ASSUMPTIONS: Profit Target = 6.28% per trade | Brokerage = 0.25% both sides + ₹19 DP | Income Tax = 20% STCG (update if LTCG applies: 12.5% above ₹1.25L) | Self Dividend = 50% of after-tax profit reinvested next trade

TAX NOTE: Budget 2024 (Jul 2024) changed STCG on listed equity to 20% (was 15%). Model updated. If holding > 12 months (LTCG): 12.5% tax on gains above ₹1.25L. If income > ₹50L, surcharge applies → effective rate ~22.9%. Adjust manually in that case.
